title: AccountSnapshot
description: A point-in-time snapshot of the broker account.

buying_power.description: Cash available to open new positions (USD).

equity.description: Total account value including open positions (USD).

pdt_flag.description: True if the account is flagged as a Pattern Day Trader.

pdt_trades_remaining.description: Day trades remaining this rolling 5-day window before PDT restrictions apply. Null if account is already flagged PDT.

snapshot_at.description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was taken.
